allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./tools/desk/editor.js'\).then\(async m => { const data = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./outputs/2026-05-15/data.json','utf8'\)\); const plan = await m.runEditor\(data, { news:{themes:['금리','반도체']}, analyst:{findings:[]}, crypto:{findings:[]} }\); console.log\('헤드라인:', plan.headline\); console.log\('include_crypto:', plan.include_crypto\); console.log\('include_analyst:', plan.include_analyst\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "console.log\('GOOGLE_API_KEY:', !!process.env.GOOGLE_API_KEY\); console.log\('NAVER_CLIENT_ID:', !!process.env.NAVER_CLIENT_ID\); console.log\('GMAIL_SENDER:', process.env.GMAIL_SENDER || '없음'\); console.log\('GMAIL_RECIPIENT:', process.env.GMAIL_RECIPIENT || '없음'\); console.log\('NOTION_API_KEY:', !!process.env.NOTION_API_KEY\); console.log\('NOTION_ARCHIVE_DB_ID:', !!process.env.NOTION_ARCHIVE_DB_ID\); console.log\('PAGES_BASE_URL:', process.env.PAGES_BASE_URL || '없음'\);" -r dotenv/config)

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./outputs/2026-05-15/data.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('KOSPI:', JSON.stringify\(d.domestic.kospi,null,2\)\); console.log\('VKOSPI:', JSON.stringify\(d.domestic.vkospi,null,2\)\); console.log\('supply:', JSON.stringify\(d.domestic.supply,null,2\)\); console.log\('supplyHistory:', d.domestic.supplyHistory ? 'present' : 'ABSENT'\); console.log\('marketCap:', d.domestic.kospi?.marketCap, d.domestic.marketCap\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./outputs/2026-05-15/data.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('marketCap:', d.domestic.marketCap, '조'\); console.log\('VKOSPI today:', d.domestic.vkospi?.today\); console.log\('supply foreign:', d.domestic.supply?.foreign\); console.log\('supplyHistory len:', d.domestic.supplyHistory?.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./outputs/2026-05-15/data.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('KOSPI today:', d.domestic.kospi?.today, '\(source:', d.domestic.kospi?.source, '\)'\); console.log\('marketCap:', d.domestic.marketCap, '/ prev:', d.domestic.prevMarketCap, '/ pct:', d.domestic.marketCapPct\); console.log\('volumeBn:', d.domestic.volumeBn, '/ prevVolumeBn:', d.domestic.prevVolumeBn\); console.log\('kospiHistory last 2:', JSON.stringify\(d.domestic.kospiHistory.slice\(-2\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./outputs/2026-05-15/data.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('KOSPI:', d.domestic.kospi?.today, '/ source:', d.domestic.kospi?.source\); console.log\('marketCap:', d.domestic.marketCap, '/ prev:', d.domestic.prevMarketCap, '/ pct:', d.domestic.marketCapPct\); console.log\('volumeBn:', d.domestic.volumeBn, '/ prevVolumeBn:', d.domestic.prevVolumeBn\); console.log\('VKOSPI:', d.domestic.vkospi?.today\); console.log\('kospiHistory tradingValueBn[]:', d.domestic.kospiHistory.map\(h=>h.tradingValueBn\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./outputs/2026-05-15/data.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('KOSPI:', d.domestic.kospi?.today, '/', d.domestic.kospi?.source\); console.log\('KOSDAQ:', d.domestic.kosdaq?.today, '/', d.domestic.kosdaq?.source\); console.log\('VKOSPI:', d.domestic.vkospi?.today\);")

PowerShell($out = "$env:TEMP\\hk_consensus.html"; curl.exe -sS -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" -e "https://consensus.hankyung.com/" "https://consensus.hankyung.com/analysis/list?market=KOR&report_type=CO" -o $out; "size: $\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length\)")

Bash(curl -sS -o NUL -w "old_search: %{http_code}\\n" -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://consensus.hankyung.com/apps.analysis/analysis.list?search_value=%EC%82%BC%EC%84%B1%EC%A0%84%EC%9E%90&report_type=&search_type=2")

Bash(curl -sSL -o NUL -w "new_search: %{http_code} \(final: %{url_effective}, size: %{size_download}\)\\n" -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://consensus.hankyung.com/analysis/list?search_value=%EC%82%BC%EC%84%B1%EC%A0%84%EC%9E%90&report_type=&search_type=2")

Bash(curl -sS -o NUL -w 'report_idx=__TRACKED_VAR__ → %{http_code}\\n' -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' 'https://consensus.hankyung.com/apps.analysis/analysis.view?report_idx=__TRACKED_VAR__')

Bash(curl -sS -o NUL -w 'downpdf?report_idx=__TRACKED_VAR__ → %{http_code}\\n' -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' 'https://consensus.hankyung.com/analysis/downpdf?report_idx=__TRACKED_VAR__')
